No Poverty.reason: The course explicitly covers '社會階層與社會流動' and '全球的不平等與社會變遷,' which are fundamental to understanding poverty's multi-dimensional aspects and inequalities (Target 1.2, 1.b). Both models converged on this score.
evidence: 全球的不平等與社會變遷

evidence: 社會中的團體、組織與制度
